ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industry_metrics" (
  "code" TEXT /* Unique date code for each dataset */,
  "NoDur" REAL /* Performance of Non-Durable Goods industry */,
  "Durbl" REAL /* Performance of Durable Goods industry */,
  "Manuf" REAL /* Performance of Manufacturing industry */,
  "Enrgy" REAL /* Performance of Energy industry */,
  "HiTec" REAL /* Performance of High-Tech industry */,
  "Telcm" REAL /* Performance of Telecommunications industry */,
  "Shops" REAL /* Performance of Retail industry */,
  "Hlth" REAL /* Performance of Healthcare industry */,
  "Utils" REAL /* Performance of Utilities industry */,
  "Other" REAL /* Performance of Other industries */,
  "market_index" REAL /* Overall market performance on the same date */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the corresponding period */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the corresponding period */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the corresponding period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., NoDur, Durbl, Manuf, Enrgy, HiTec, Telcm, Shops, Hlth, Utils) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Broader sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "weight_in_market" REAL /* Weight of the industry in the overall market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the industry data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code (date) of the industry metrics being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the industry metrics */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the industry metrics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_code FOREIGN KEY ("code") REFERENCES industry_metrics ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader (user_id) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
